---
name: Feature Request / 功能建议
about: 建议一个新功能 / Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 功能描述 / Feature Description
<!-- 清晰简洁地描述你希望实现的功能 / A clear and concise description of what you want -->

## 解决的问题 / Problem it Solves
<!-- 描述这个功能解决了什么痛点 / Describe the problem or limitation this feature addresses -->

## 你的方案 / Proposed Solution
<!-- 描述你希望如何实现它 / Describe the solution you'd like -->

## 替代方案 / Alternatives Considered
<!-- 你是否考虑过其他方案？ / Have you considered any alternative solutions? -->

## 补充信息 / Additional Context
<!-- 截图、参考链接等 / Screenshots, mockups, or reference links -->
